mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_uid, title, feed_url, site_url, cat_id, last_updated, last_error, update_interval, last_update_check, is_updating, update_stamp FROM ttrss_feeds WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} ORDER BY title ASC

SELECT id, owner_uid, title, feed_url, site_url, cat_id, last_updated, last_error, update_interval, last_update_check, is_updating, update_stamp FROM ttrss_feeds WHERE cat_id = #{catId} ORDER BY title ASC
SELECT id, owner_uid, title, feed_url, site_url, cat_id, last_updated, last_error, update_interval, last_update_check, is_updating, update_stamp FROM ttrss_feeds WHERE feed_url = #{feedUrl} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, owner_uid, title, feed_url, site_url, cat_id, last_updated, last_error, update_interval, last_update_check, is_updating, update_stamp FROM ttrss_feeds WHERE is_updating = FALSE AND (last_update_check IS NULL OR last_update_check + (update_interval || ' minutes')::INTERVAL <= #{now}) ORDER BY last_update_check ASC NULLS FIRST
